top.name: Maze of Mirrors
top.rules_text: Create 4 illusory copies of your wizard on prepared tiles. Enemies must guess which is real (random targeting). Copies have 2HP and trigger their tile's glyph when destroyed. Lasts 3 turns.

channel.name: Maze of Mirrors (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Copies have 6HP and dealing damage to a copy reflects it back

bottom.name: Web of Fate
bottom.rules_text: Link ALL prepared tiles on the board into a network. Triggering any one tile triggers ALL of them in sequence with +1 cumulative damage each.

channel.name: Web of Fate (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Network persists after triggering (can be triggered again next turn)
